# Vendored Frontend Libraries

- `elk.bundled.js`
  - Source: `https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/elkjs@0.11.0/lib/elk.bundled.js`
  - License: Eclipse Public License 2.0, copied in `elkjs-LICENSE.md`
  - Usage: `tools/video-dag-canvas.html` uses this local copy for DAG layout so exported static HTML works offline.
- `lightweight-charts-5.2.0.standalone.production.js`
  - Source: `https://registry.npmjs.org/lightweight-charts/-/lightweight-charts-5.2.0.tgz` (`dist/lightweight-charts.standalone.production.js`)
  - License: Apache License 2.0, copied in `lightweight-charts-LICENSE.md`
  - Usage: finance outlook reports use this local copy for historical candlestick charts and target-price lines.
